content.speakerText: I need to send this package next week. Which option do you recommend?
content.speakerTextCn: 我下周要寄这个包裹，你推荐哪种方式？
expectedAnswers: If you need it fast, go with express — it’s $35 and arrives in 3 days. If not, standard at $15 is fine.
I’d recommend express if you’re on a deadline, otherwise standard saves you $20.
It depends — if Friday is your target, only express works. Otherwise, standard is more budget-friendly.
evaluationCriteria: 是否根据对方需求（时间/预算）给出针对性建议
是否使用了对比结构（if...otherwise / otherwise）增强逻辑性
是否自然使用了场景关键词如 express, standard, arrives, budget-friendly

content.scenarioHint: 顾客在网店结账时，想了解不同快递方式的费用和送达时间，以便选择最适合的选项
expectedAnswers: What are the shipping options and how much do they cost?
How long does standard shipping take compared to express?
Could you tell me the price and delivery time for both economy and fast shipping?
Which option gets here the quickest, and what’s the difference in cost?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确询问了快递方式、价格和时效
语言准确性：语法正确，时态和用词无错误
表达自然度：符合日常英语口语习惯，无中式表达
关键词覆盖：使用了 shipping, cost, price, delivery time, option 等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 顾客急需收到包裹，想确认是否能在周末前送达，同时想知道是否有加急服务
expectedAnswers: Can I get this delivered by Saturday with express shipping?
Is there a same-day or overnight option? If so, how much extra does it cost?
Will the fastest service get it to me before the weekend?
What’s the latest I can ship today to make Saturday delivery?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确询问了截止时间、加急选项及额外费用
语言准确性：正确使用了 can, will, if so, how much extra 等自然表达
表达自然度：符合真实对话节奏，避免生硬或过度正式
关键词覆盖：使用了 deliver, express, same-day, overnight, weekend, extra cost 等关键词
